memberdef.name: ARCH_EXCEPT

detaileddescription.para: This generates hardware exception which is used by ARCH_EXCEPT().
This generates kernel oops which is used by arch_syscall_oops().

briefdescription.para: Lock VECBASE if supported by hardware.

detaileddescription.para: The bit 0 of VECBASE acts as a lock bit on hardware supporting this feature. When this bit is set, VECBASE cannot be changed until it is cleared by hardware reset. When the hardware does not support this bit, it is hardwired to 0.

briefdescription.para: Perform additional steps after MMU initialization.

detaileddescription.para: This performs additional steps related to memory management after the main MMU initialization code. This needs to defined in the SoC layer. Default is do no nothing.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is called while executing on CPU core #0.

detaileddescription.para: This header contains the Xtensa specific kernel interface. It is included by the kernel interface architecture-abstraction header (include/zephyr/arch/cpu.h).
